title: Halal Earthy Date Night Steak Tips
description: A delightful halal-friendly earthy date-night dish featuring tenderized sirloin steak tips simmered in a rich, aromatic sauce with dates and other earthy ingredients.
instructions: Season steak tips with olive oil, minced garlic, ground cumin, and ground coriander. Place on a baking sheet.
Sear steak tips in a skillet over medium-high heat until nicely browned on all sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same skillet, add chopped fresh rosemary, chicken broth, red wine, date syrup, and freshly grated Parmesan cheese. Stir well to combine.
Add seared steak tips back into the skillet with the sauce mixture. Cover with a lid or foil and simmer for about 20 minutes until tender.
Sprinkle thyme leaves on top of the steak before serving.
Serve hot with crusty bread if desired.
